statement.informal: `coulomb_count_step` satisfies its @verify contract: under preconditions (soc_prev >= SOC_MIN ∧ soc_prev <= SOC_MAX ∧ abs(current_a) <= I_MAX ∧ capacity_ah >= Q_MIN ∧ capacity_ah <= Q_MAX ∧ dt_s >= 0.0 ∧ dt_s <= DT_MAX), the function's result satisfies (result >= SOC_MIN ∧ result <= SOC_MAX). This is the obligation Forge ships to a Lean target for DO-178C / IEC-61508 / ISO-26262 certification evidence.
